steps.title: Identify the target meaning
steps.content: The passage describes paleontologists studying well-preserved fossils to learn about ancient life. The blank requires a verb for what they do—acquiring or extracting knowledge from the fossils.

steps.title: Select the word expressing that meaning
steps.content: Obtain means to acquire or gain—matching the target meaning exactly. The other three don't fit: occupy doesn't apply to information, reserve means setting aside not gaining, and hoard suggests secretive excess rather than scientific discovery. That matches choice D — D is correct.
